name: plaground-platform
description: PLAground 3D printing commerce and operations platform

scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:migrate:dev: pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: pnpm --filter api exec prisma db seed
scripts.db:reset: pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate reset
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose -f infra/compose/docker-compose.yml -f infra/compose/docker-compose.override.yml down -v && pnpm docker:up
